root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not a joke.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, but don't worry. Because you're going to die before any of that happens.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, but don't worry. Because you're going to die before any of that happens.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, but don't worry. Because you're going to die before any of that happens.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right! Want to know another interesting fact?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right! Want to know another interesting fact?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right! Want to know another interesting fact?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We knew that you'd fall for this trap.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We knew that you'd fall for this trap.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We knew that you'd fall for this trap.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The reason being...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The reason being...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The reason being...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uhu huu, how cute.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uhu huu, how cute.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uhu huu, how cute.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So this is the girl who wanted to meet me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So this is the girl who wanted to meet me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So this is the girl who wanted to meet me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What a pretty bunny. I think she'll make an excellent pet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What a pretty bunny. I think she'll make an excellent pet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What a pretty bunny. I think she'll make an excellent pet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Car... men...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Car... men...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Car... men...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nice to meet you. I also wanted to meet you, pretty bunny.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nice to meet you. I also wanted to meet you, pretty bunny.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nice to meet you. I also wanted to meet you, pretty bunny.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'm going to kill you, Carmen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'm going to kill you, Carmen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'm going to kill you, Carmen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, look at you squirm.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, look at you squirm.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, look at you squirm.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you freeze your own body so you can control your limbs with your ability?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you freeze your own body so you can control your limbs with your ability?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you freeze your own body so you can control your limbs with your ability?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Guess descendants of Bygones do all kinds of weird stuff, eh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Guess descendants of Bygones do all kinds of weird stuff, eh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Guess descendants of Bygones do all kinds of weird stuff, eh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut... up...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut... up...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut... up...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You sure you'll be all right? Didn't you say that your ice lowers the surrounding's temperature?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You sure you'll be all right? Didn't you say that your ice lowers the surrounding's temperature?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You sure you'll be all right? Didn't you say that your ice lowers the surrounding's temperature?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What will you do if you accidentally freeze your own brain?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What will you do if you accidentally freeze your own brain?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What will you do if you accidentally freeze your own brain?

root.m_Talk_ENG: SHUT UP!! I'm going to kill you even if that's the last thing I do!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: SHUT UP!! I'm going to kill you even if that's the last thing I do!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: SHUT UP!! I'm going to kill you even if that's the last thing I do!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: CARMEN...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: CARMEN...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: CARMEN...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, so loud.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, so loud.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, so loud.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shena, she must be quite eccentric despite her appearance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shena, she must be quite eccentric despite her appearance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shena, she must be quite eccentric despite her appearance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just don't understand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just don't understand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just don't understand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you this obsessed with Carmen?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you this obsessed with Carmen?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you this obsessed with Carmen?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I guess it doesn't matter anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I guess it doesn't matter anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I guess it doesn't matter anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: While we're here, why don't we dance for a little while before Chief Conductor calls us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: While we're here, why don't we dance for a little while before Chief Conductor calls us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: While we're here, why don't we dance for a little while before Chief Conductor calls us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please don't disappoint us. Okay, you stupid bunny?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please don't disappoint us. Okay, you stupid bunny?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please don't disappoint us. Okay, you stupid bunny?
